title: CodeGrind City Map and City Scene: Fresh Visual Enhancements
summary: Showcase the latest CityMap/CityScene improvements and their impact on District 01 navigation and immersion.
core_message: CodeGrind's recent map and scene updates enhance district navigation, mobile shell visibility, and walking interactions, delivering a more immersive cyberpunk coding world.
cta: Explore the new District 01 visuals and try the updated CityMap features in CodeGrind.
visual_brief: Static hero-style image of District 01 cityscape with neon cyberpunk UI overlays, highlighting CityMap and CityScene components, with subtle motion blur to imply depth. Include captions: CityMap · CityScene · District 01.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.
